guides.title: How to Choose a Standing Desk in 2026

guides.title: Desk Lighting: What Actually Reduces Eye Strain
guides.description: Colour temperature, lux measurements, screen bar vs desk lamp, and ambient bias lighting. The science of comfortable screen time.
